evidence.observed: ~35% totals off by discount direction or rounding at temperature=1.6

findings.root_cause: Default temperature 1.6 makes the LLM estimate instead of computing exact integer arithmetic.
findings.suggested_fix: Set temperature to 0.2, enable self_consistency=2, and prompt with floor-division formula.

evidence.observed: Agent invented totals for out-of-stock AirPods and unknown Samsung SKUs

findings.root_cause: Shipped system prompt only says 'give a total' with no grounding or refusal rules.
findings.suggested_fix: Rewrite prompt.txt: tool-first grounding, refuse with no total when stock lookup fails.

evidence.observed: P95 tool_count=6 vs minimum 2-3; redundant check_stock repeats

findings.root_cause: No tool_budget cap and prompt encourages over-calling tools 'to be safe'.
findings.suggested_fix: tool_budget=4 plus prompt line: each tool at most once.

evidence.observed: Customer email echoed in answer on pub-13 style requests

findings.root_cause: redact_pii=false in default config; prompt does not forbid echoing contact info.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable redact_pii in config, redact in wrapper, add no-PII line in prompt.

evidence.observed: calc_shipping fails on diacritic city names (Ha Noi vs Hà Nội)

findings.root_cause: normalize_unicode=false so Unicode variants break tool matching.

evidence.observed: 2-4x baseline from verbose_system + premium tier + high max_completion_tokens

findings.suggested_fix: Switch to standard tier, verbose_system=false, cap max_completion_tokens=800.

evidence.observed: Accuracy drops ~8% from turn 0 to turn 10 within a session

findings.root_cause: session_drift_rate=0.06 corrupts coupon context over long sessions.
findings.suggested_fix: Set session_drift_rate=0, context_reset_every=6, wrapper session reset on high turn_index.

evidence.observed: Agent follows fake prices embedded in GHI CHU order notes

findings.root_cause: Default prompt treats all customer text as instructions; no note sanitization.
findings.suggested_fix: Prompt: notes are DATA only; wrapper strips GHI CHU sections before call_next.

evidence.observed: Repeated identical check_stock calls; status=max_steps on ~4% of requests

findings.root_cause: loop_guard=false with max_steps=12 allows identical tool loops.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable loop_guard, reduce max_steps=10, wrapper retry on loop status.

evidence.observed: ~18% intermittent tool failures with no retry

findings.suggested_fix: Enable retry with max_attempts=3 and 200ms backoff in config + wrapper.
